---
title: "Katharine Barter"
---

## Katharine Barter

**Dates:** (1755/6-20 January 1850)

### Description

mother of the Rev. Robert Speckott Barter

### Biography

Widow of the Rev. Charles Barter, Vicar of Cornworthy.  Her death reported in the <i>Morning Post</i> (26 January 1850).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 14th [1867]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
